Make these specific code changes to three files, then run npm test. Here are the exact changes needed:

/Users/rom.iluz/Dev/sql-hidden-cost/benchmark/runs-enterprise-full/schema-evolution-enterprise/postgres-jsonb/claude-code/repeat-4/workspace

```
Change it to:

    annualRevenue: data.annualRevenue || null,
    preferredPaymentMethod: data.preferredPaymentMethod || null,

    updatedAt: data.updatedAt || new Date().toISOString(),
```

```javascript

  };

```javascript
  return {
    accountId,
    accountName: account.name,

    totalAmount,
    ordersByStatus,
